title: Kormoran group
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Kormoran'' group}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
The '''''Kormoran'' group''' was a group of five [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|CR92a ''Assassin''-class corvettes]] used by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]]. They were sent to [[Battle of Serenity|destroy]] a convoy of two [[container transport]]s, called ''[[Neelie]]''. The targets were supposed to be carrying [[Missile Boat]]s but instead carried munitions. The corvettes were lured into an ambush and destroyed.

==Appearances==
